fixSummaryByRootCause.execution_environment_configuration: Patched the shared query runtime to auto-inject MCP helper imports before allowed-module extraction so generated planner code can execute callMcp helpers without module-whitelist failures.
fixSummaryByRootCause.planning_missing_target_market: Expanded single-market resolution paths so efficiency and rules tools can accept marketQuery-style prompts and fall back to a strong live binary market when the prompt is deictic.
fixSummaryByRootCause.missing_market_resolution: Extended market-resolution fallbacks for single-market whale analysis and related workflows so live deictic market prompts map to a concrete contract instead of stalling.
fixSummaryByRootCause.placeholder_event_resolution: Extended multi-outcome event workflows to resolve from event queries and, when needed, fall back to a strong live multi-outcome event instead of returning placeholders.
fixSummaryByRootCause.unnecessary_clarification: Added event-resolution fallbacks for live-volume analysis so deictic event prompts can resolve directly from slug, eventQuery, or a live fallback event before clarification.
fixSummaryByRootCause.clarification_punt_for_history_query: Extended event outcome quote comparison to support history-aware momentum prompts, fetch recent price history, and rank outcomes by recent movement alongside current spreads.
fixSummaryByRootCause.missing_cross_venue_tool_coverage: Expanded the Polymarket-to-Kalshi cross-reference path so marketQuery prompts first resolve a Polymarket contract before building Kalshi search terms.
fixSummaryByRootCause.execution_timeout_partial_orderbook: Kept comparison answers on the quote-snapshot path and enriched the event-outcome comparison output so named-outcome comparisons return direct quote fields without partial placeholder synthesis.
fixSummaryByRootCause.limited_scan_scope: Broadened trending-market outputs to surface category and tag drivers plus grouped liquid examples so hot-tag prompts have deeper scan coverage.
fixSummaryByRootCause.overstated_synthesis: Tightened the high-conviction workflow outputs so setup cards reflect explicit rule/liquidity/edge checks and analysisNotes carry blockers when setups do not survive the screen.
fixSummaryByRootCause.synthesis_field_mapping: Added an explicit yesPrice alias to top-market outputs so YES-price tables map directly without field-name ambiguity.
fixSummaryByRootCause.upstream_listing_mismatch: Improved the Polymarket-to-Kalshi matching path used by cross-venue screens so Polymarket contract resolution happens before venue comparison.
fixSummaryByRootCause.insufficient_discovery_depth: Preserved the deeper live-market selection path used by combined tape/open-interest workflows so deictic prompts can still land on a concrete live market.
